title: Senior Software Engineer - Flipkart - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Flipkart - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Flipkart in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
